contradictionRules.label: Silas frame conflicts with Evelyn truth route
contradictionRules.resolution: The false-frame ending may believe Silas killed Rowan, but canonical truth keeps Evelyn as the killer.
contradictionRules.notes: Used to prevent dialogue context from treating the playable bad ending as true.

contradictionRules.label: Station discovery is not the murder location
contradictionRules.resolution: Characters may say Rowan was found at the station, but should not infer he died there without proof.
